name: Mercury
description: Mercury is a modern business banking platform designed for startups and tech companies. The API provides access to accounts, transactions, recipients, and electronic payments, enabling automated treasury management and financial operations.

capabilities.name: list_accounts
capabilities.description: List all bank accounts associated with your Mercury organization, including checking and savings accounts.

capabilities.name: get_account_details
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific account including balance, routing number, and account number.

capabilities.name: list_transactions
capabilities.description: List transactions for a specific account with optional filtering by date range, status, and type.

capabilities.name: create_recipient
capabilities.description: Create a new payment recipient with their bank account details for sending electronic payments.

capabilities.name: list_recipients
capabilities.description: List all saved payment recipients in your Mercury account.

capabilities.name: send_payment
capabilities.description: Initiate an electronic payment (ACH or wire) to a saved recipient from one of your accounts.
